targets.visualRule: Three readable, distinct silhouettes (broad oak, tall pine, flowering blossom) sharing the same flattened 'pop-up book' perspective (Section 4a) and canvas so future Y-sort placement against the player and Mira is consistent. Each must remain a clearly different shape at a glance, not a recolor of the same silhouette.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.
renderLayer is actors_body so a tall tree can Y-sort correctly against the player at map-integration time; this spec adds no Y-sort implementation.

targets.visualRule: Single-tile bush cluster, low enough to read as ground clutter rather than a tall obstacle. Two variants for rhythm without an obvious repeated stamp.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.

targets.visualRule: Two-tile-tall bush mass for borders and landmark density (the plan's 'bush clusters in multiple sizes' requirement paired with env_farm_bush_small), same flattened perspective as env_farm_tree.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.

targets.visualRule: Small ground-level flower cluster, four color palettes for visual rhythm across the farm without a fifth competing tile grid. Must stay quieter than actors and crop overlays.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.

targets.visualRule: Sparse, non-repeating undergrowth scatter, quieter than env_farm_flower_cluster; reinforces natural variation rather than a second grid.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.

targets.visualRule: Small scatter stones, low profile, no meaningful height. Two variants avoid an obvious repeated stamp.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.

targets.visualRule: A two-tile-scale rock landmark, taller than env_farm_stone_small, suitable as a border/landmark accent (e.g. near the Moonwell Echo Wildbloom spot per the plan's Phase 3 landmark placements).
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.
Whether this becomes a solid obstacle is a Phase 3 map-integration decision; this target adds no collision behavior.

targets.visualRule: A single fallen branch/log lying flat along the ground plane, spanning two tiles horizontally. Low profile — reads as ground decoration, not a standing obstacle.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.

targets.visualRule: Modular fence kit sharing one weathered-wood material story; the broken variant must read as clearly damaged (missing rail, leaning post) without looking unintentional or like an authoring error. Solid by target spec, matching the plan's 'fence posts, rails, corners, gates, and broken variants' requirement.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.

targets.visualRule: A two-tile-wide gate matching the env_farm_fence material story; the broken variant reuses the fence kit's damage language. The gate interaction box is metadata only and adds no transition/open behavior.
notes: Specification only; no art is included.
No runtime behavior is added.
